summary: Frontend testing for LOGITAG SaaS UI/UX Refonte - Secondary pages (Calendrier, Map, Rapports, Paramètres) and Utilisateurs page routing. All 6 test cases PASSED. All SaaS Premium headers with colored icons, count badges, and proper layouts are working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 errors from external API - not a code issue, external dependency

dashboard_page.period_filter_pills: PASS - Period filter pills (Tout, Aujourd'hui, 7 jours, 30 jours) visible
dashboard_page.no_regression: PASS - Dashboard working correctly after modifications

calendrier_page.saas_header: PASS - SaaS header with purple icon (pi-calendar) found
calendrier_page.title: PASS - 'Calendrier' title with subtitle 'Planification et suivi des mouvements'
calendrier_page.fullcalendar: PASS - FullCalendar component loaded with timeline view
calendrier_page.navigation_controls: PASS - Today button, date range, slot duration controls visible

map_page.saas_header: PASS - SaaS header with green icon (pi-map) found
map_page.title: PASS - 'Carte des Assets' title with subtitle 'Localisation GPS en temps réel'
map_page.leaflet_map: PASS - Leaflet map container loaded with markers
map_page.asset_list_panel: PASS - Left panel with asset list visible

rapports_page.saas_header: PASS - SaaS header with orange icon (pi-chart-bar) found
rapports_page.title: PASS - 'Rapports' title with subtitle 'Génération et consultation des rapports'
rapports_page.sidebar: PASS - 'Rapport générés' sidebar with report list visible
rapports_page.content_area: PASS - Report display content area found

utilisateurs_page.saas_header: PASS - SaaS header with indigo icon (pi-users) found
utilisateurs_page.title: PASS - 'staff.list' title with subtitle 'Gestion du personnel et des accès'
utilisateurs_page.datatable: PASS - DataTable with user data loaded
utilisateurs_page.routing: PASS - URL correctly shows '/view/staff/index' - dynamic routing working

parametres_page.submenu_navigation: PASS - Paramètres menu expands with submenus (Entreprise, Famille, Status, EnginNoActive)
parametres_page.company_settings: PASS - Company settings page loads with tabs (Informations, Addresse, Param)

saas_ui_elements_verified.lt_page_container: PASS - .lt-page class applied to all pages
saas_ui_elements_verified.lt_page_icon: PASS - Colored gradient icons (purple, green, orange, indigo, gray)
saas_ui_elements_verified.lt_table_wrap: PASS - Card-style containers with rounded corners
saas_ui_elements_verified.lt_view_toggle: PASS - Toggle buttons for Engin/Worksite on Calendar
saas_ui_elements_verified.lt_rapports_layout: PASS - Two-column layout for Rapports page

critical_code_review_comments: React warnings about unique 'key' props in PrivateRoutes, SidebarMenuMain, ChatMessage, DatatableComponent - minor issue, not affecting functionality
React warning about 'class' vs 'className' in DatatableComponent - minor issue
React warning about non-boolean 'sortable' attribute - minor issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SaaS UI/UX refonte features tested and working. Pages tested: Dashboard (no regression), Calendrier (purple icon, toggles, search, FullCalendar), Map (green icon, Leaflet map, asset list), Rapports (orange icon, sidebar/content layout), Utilisateurs (indigo icon, DataTable, dynamic routing via view/staff/index), Paramètres (submenu navigation). All pages use lt-page, lt-page-header, lt-page-icon, lt-count-badge CSS classes from logitag-saas.css. External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) has intermittent 500 errors but this is not a code issue.
